MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, PRABHA COURT TRIAL SET FOR SEP-09-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

#1 JDG WICK. CSR BRENDA FIELDS. CLERK G. VAN HEST. 12:07 PM C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PLTF PRESENT WITH COUNSEL DAVID MENDEZ, DEFT PRESENT WITH COUNSEL PATRICK THOMPSON. A STIPULATED JUDGMENT READ INTO THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: PLTF TO HAVE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT DELTA HOTEL, 88 - 6TH STREET, #127. WRIT MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY BUT EXECUTION STAYED TILL AFTER 9AM ON 9-29-93. DEFT TO LEAVE PREMISES BROOMCLEAN AND TURN IN ALL KEYS TO PLTF. IF DEFT FAILS TO COMPLY, PLTF MAY PURSUE ACTUAL EVICTION AND ANY AMTS DUE. DEFT ONLY ADULT OCCUPANT. IF DEFT COMPLIES, PLTF WILL VACATE THE JUDGMENT AND FILE A DISMISSAL. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS AND ATTY FEES. STIPULATION SIGNED IN OPEN COURT BY ALL PARTIES AND WILL BE SUBMITTED TO THE COURT AT A LATER DATE.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KOSTNER, VALERIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: DELTA HOTEL, 88 - 6TH STREET, #127, S.F., STAYED UNTIL SEP-29-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
